name: Mautic Control
description: Typed tools for controlled Mautic REST API access, webhook inspection, optional console maintenance, and optional workspace file staging.

baseUrl.description: Base URL OpenClaw uses to reach the Mautic web container.

consoleUrl.description: Internal console bridge URL for safe maintenance commands.

allowedWorkspaceRoot.description: Hard path guard. workspaceRoot and all file operations must stay under this directory.

defaultApiVersion.description: Default API mapping used by mautic_entity when apiVersion is omitted.

requestTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for Mautic HTTP API and dashboard probes.

allowMaintenanceCommands.description: Allow safe maintenance commands: cache:clear, mautic:cache:clear, and plugins:reload. migrations:status is always allowed.

allowAutomationJobCommands.description: Allow safe background job commands: webhooks:process, campaigns:rebuild, campaigns:trigger, and segments:update.

allowWorkspaceRead.description: Allow listing and reading files under workspaceRoot. Keep disabled unless the OpenClaw operator is trusted to inspect staged Mautic files.

allowWorkspaceWrite.description: Allow writing and deleting files under workspaceRoot. Keep disabled unless the OpenClaw operator is trusted to modify staged Mautic files.
